---
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="landing-shell">
  <section class="hero">
    <div class="hero__header">
      <h1 class="hero__title">{{COURSE_TITLE}}</h1>
      <img class="hero__logo" src="{{COURSE_LOGO}}" alt="SciLifeLab logo" />
    </div>
    <p class="hero__subtitle">{{COURSE_SUBTITLE}}</p>
    <div class="hero__actions">
      {{HERO_ACTIONS}}
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="cards-grid cards-grid--top">
    {{TOP_CARDS}}
  </section>

  <section class="instances-band">
    <div class="current-instance-card">
      <p class="instance-label">{{CURRENT_INSTANCE_NOTE}}</p>
      <h2 class="instance-title">{{CURRENT_INSTANCE_TITLE}}</h2>
      <a class="instance-link" href="{{CURRENT_INSTANCE_LINK}}">Open</a>
      {{CURRENT_REGISTRATION_BUTTON}}
    </div>

    <div class="previous-instances">
      <h2 class="section-title">Previous course instances</h2>
      <div class="instance-grid">
        {{PREVIOUS_INSTANCE_CARDS}}
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="cards-grid cards-grid--bottom">
    <article class="info-card">
      <div class="card-headline">
        <i class="bi bi-people"></i>
        <h3>Course founders</h3>
      </div>
      <ul class="people-list">
        {{FOUNDERS_LIST}}
      </ul>
    </article>

    <article class="info-card">
      <div class="card-headline">
        <i class="bi bi-person-workspace"></i>
        <h3>Contributors</h3>
      </div>
      <ul class="people-list">
        {{CONTRIBUTORS_LIST}}
      </ul>
    </article>
  </section>

  <footer class="landing-footer">
    <p>{{FOOTER_LICENSE}}</p>
    <p>{{FOOTER_BUILT_WITH}}</p>
    <a href="{{FOOTER_GITHUB_URL}}" aria-label="GitHub repository">
      <i class="bi bi-github"></i>
    </a>
  </footer>
</div>
```
